title: FIN Bridge Event Envelope
description: One FIN signal forwarded up inside a poll-request. Agent -> server. Observational, not a mutation: under buffer pressure the agent drops oldest events and reports a running droppedEvents count on the poll-request. Tool-layer throttling/burst-collapse (#21) sits above this raw envelope.

seq.title: Sequence Number
seq.description: Monotonically increasing per-agent sequence number. Combined with the poll-request droppedEvents count it lets the server detect gaps and order events without trusting the agent clock.

signal.title: Signal Name
signal.description: FIN signal name (e.g. ItemTransfer, PowerFuseChanged, ProductionChanged) - the first element of FIN's event.pull tuple.

data.title: Signal Data
data.description: Signal-specific payload (the trailing event.pull args), object-shaped. May be empty for parameterless signals.

agentTimestamp.title: Agent Timestamp
agentTimestamp.description: The agent's computer.millis()-style clock at emission. Advisory telemetry only; the server stamps authoritative receivedAt on ingest and orders by seq + receivedAt, never by this value.
